---
title: ""
format: 
  beamer:
    theme: Berlin
    colortheme: beaver
    fonttheme: structurebold
    latex-engine: xelatex
    number-sections: false
    include-in-header: text.tex
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{graphicx}
  - \usepackage{ragged2e}
  - \usepackage{setspace}\singlespacing
  - \usepackage[dvipsnames]{xcolor}
  - \usepackage{fontspec}
  - \setmainfont{Times New Roman}
  - \setsansfont{Arial}
  - \setmonofont{Courier New}
  - \renewcommand{\normalsize}{\fontsize{14}{16}\selectfont}
  - \renewcommand{\Large}{\fontsize{16}{18}\selectfont}
  - \renewcommand{\LARGE}{\fontsize{18}{20}\selectfont}
  - \setbeamertemplate{footline}[frame number]
  - \setbeamertemplate{navigation symbols}{}
  - \makeatletter
  - \setbeamercolor{frametitle}{bg=white, fg=BrickRed}
  - \setbeamertemplate{frametitle}{
      \vspace{0.2cm}
      \begin{beamercolorbox}[sep=0.2cm, leftskip=0.5cm, wd=\paperwidth]{frametitle}
        \usebeamerfont{frametitle}\insertframetitle
      \end{beamercolorbox}
    }
  - \makeatother
  - \usepackage{hyperref}
  - \hypersetup{
      colorlinks=true,
      linkcolor=blue,
      urlcolor=blue,
      citecolor=blue,
      filecolor=blue,
      pdfnewwindow=true
    }
  - \let\oldhref\href
  - \renewcommand{\href}[2]{\textcolor{blue}{\oldhref{#1}{#2}}}
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(knitr)
library(ggridges)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r logo-psicostat, out.width="20%", fig.align='center'}
include_graphics("images/logo.png")
```

\begin{center}
\Large
\textbf{Causal Inference for Latent Genetic Factors} \par
\textbf{Underlying Psychopathology}
\end{center}

\vspace{0.15cm}

\centering
\small Laura Sità

\vspace{1cm}
\flushleft
\small \textbf{HandZone October 30th, 2025}


# Boh

```{r nmf}
#| echo: false
source("nmf.R")
```

```{r grafico}
#| echo: false

plotxslide <- ggplot(df, aes(x = C, y = as.factor(k), fill = Tr)) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 18) +
  labs(
    x = "Latent outcome distribution", 
    y = "Latent dimension",
    fill = "Group"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 22, margin = margin(t = 20)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 22, margin = margin(r = 20)),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 29),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 22),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 13))
  )

plotxslide

```

# Materials 
tutto il materiale è disponibile nella cartella `project` della repo \href{https://github.com/laurasitaunipd/handzone.git}{laurasitaunipd/handzone}
